title: 若駒ステークスにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day of the Wakagoma Stakes, a race
that will prepare us for the Classics ahead.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Deep breaths, Teio. Hoo... Hah... Hoo... Hah...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, you probably think I'm nervous, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But you're wrong! I'm just excited we're getting
closer and closer to the Classics!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I was just calming myself down so I don't go too
wild out there from the thrill of it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Just get yourself some ice cream, then sit back
and relax! I'll have nabbed first place by the time
you finish!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'll show everyone what the rising star Teio
is made of!
